gmail_search_query: subject:(Invoice OR Expenses OR Bill) has:attachment filename:pdf newer_than:7d
gmail__search__filter_criteria: subject include: Invoice or Expenses or Bill and has:attachment filename:pdf
google_drive__create__storage_rule: attachments only; create a folder per vendor and store the attachment in it
google_sheets__create__write_rule: append only if amount is greater than 50 in the document currency
summary_columns: Type, Vendor / merchant, Date, Amount, Invoice/receipt #, Category, Drive link
